label: Macroeconomic Forecasting and Cyclical Outlook
description: Analysis of short-term economic indicators, business cycles, inflation dynamics, and the generation of projection models for Italy and the Euro area.
directorate: Economic Outlook and Monetary Policy Directorate

label: Monetary Policy Analysis and Transmission
description: Technical support and analytical modeling regarding the design, implementation, and transmission mechanisms of Eurosystem monetary policy.
directorate: Economic Outlook and Monetary Policy Directorate

label: Labor Market and Demographic Analysis
description: Research on employment dynamics, wage growth, labor supply structural factors, and the economic impacts of demographic shifts.

label: Human Capital and Education Economics
description: Evaluation of educational systems, workforce skill acquisition, innovation capabilities, and long-term impacts on aggregate productivity.

label: Public Finance and Budgetary Policy
description: Analysis of public revenues, government expenditure efficiency, fiscal sustainability, public debt dynamics, and budgetary policy evaluation.

label: Industrial Organization and Regional Structure
description: Studies on corporate dynamics, market competitiveness, sector-specific structural changes, and the geographical configuration of the Italian economy.

label: Systemic Risk and Macroprudential Frameworks
description: Identification and measurement of systemic vulnerabilities, financial risk modeling, and the calibration of macroprudential policy instruments.

label: Banking Sector and Intermediary Analysis
description: Empirical research on corporate governance, stability, funding models, and risks associated with commercial banks and non-bank financial intermediaries.

label: Financial Market Dynamics and Asset Pricing
description: Research on the functioning, liquidity, and asset pricing mechanisms of money, bond, equity, and derivative markets from a stability perspective.

label: Global Macroeconomics and Spillovers
description: Analysis of non-Euro area economies, global commodity markets, exchange rates, and the macroeconomic interdependencies affecting Italy.

label: International Trade and Global Value Chains
description: Research on international trade flows, structural shifts in global supply chains, trade policies, and external competitiveness indicators.

label: International Cooperation and Financial Fora
description: Coordination of institutional documentation, policy stances, and technical representation in international bodies like the IMF, G20, OECD, and BIS.

label: Micro-level Socio-Economic Surveys
description: Design, methodological implementation, and management of specialized sample surveys targeting households (e.g., SHIW) and firms.

label: Institutional Sector Accounts and Balance of Payments
description: Methodological compilation, aggregation, and official publication of financial accounts, institutional balance sheets, and external sector statistics.

label: Statistical Data Collection and Ingestion
description: Operational governance of raw financial, credit, and supervisory data reporting from entities, ensuring compliance and automated data verification.
directorate: Statistical Data Collection and Processing Directorate

label: Central Credit Register Operations
description: Administrative management, data quality assurance, and information distribution regarding the national Central Credit Register (Centrale dei Rischi).
directorate: Statistical Data Collection and Processing Directorate

label: None of the above
description: Topics not related to any other category
